conservative.name: Shining Example
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. You must be able to move and speak freely

success.description: As above, and the blessing's effects also apply to Disease checks and checks to resist corruption

boon.description: You and all allies within medium range recover 1 stress

chaosStar.description: When this blessing recharges completely, all characters who had been protected by it must re-check against the last effect that this blessing protected them from

sigmarsComet.description: You gain to all checks that this blessing affects. In addition, any of your allies may spend fortune points on such checks on your behalf

reckless.name: Shining Example
reckless.requirements: 6 favour. You must be able to move and speak freely

success.description: As above, and the blessing's effects also apply to Disease checks and checks to resist corruption

chaosStar.description: When this blessing recharges completely, all characters who had been protected by it must re-check against the last effect that this blessing protected them from

sigmarsComet.description: Each time you pass a check that this blessing affects, you and all allies within long range recover 1 stress
